articles.title: LIVE MN - Serie A, Sassuolo-Milan (2-0): Ricci also comes on for Jashari
articles.summary:
77' Loftus-Cheek is booked for simulation in the penalty area

76' Maignan comes out at the right time and anticipates Nzola

71' Ricci is booked

70' Shot by Volpato blocked by Gabbia

66' Jashari also comes out, Ricci comes in ...

articles.title: SAS-MIL (2-0). Allegri tries the turning point with the substitutions: Pulisic, Gimenez and Loftus-Cheek enter
articles.summary: In the 59th minute, triple substitution for Allegri: Loftus, Gimenez and Pulisic come on. Leaving the field: Saelemaekers, Fofana and Leao.

articles.title: MN - Another round, new boos: Leao also teased at Mapei
articles.summary: In the 59th minute of Sassuolo-Milan Massimiliano Allegri opted for a triple substitution, in the hope that something might move, even if the result and man less certainly don't help, especially in finding the right match pace to try here...

articles.title: SAS-MIL (2-0): Sassuolo doubles their lead. Sensational: Milan manages to start the second half in a worse way than the already disastrous first half
articles.summary: Could it have been worse than the disastrous start to the first half? Yes, Milan succeeded in the second half, taking a goal after two minutes from Lauriente after a one-two with Thorsvedt with a conclusion on which Maignan was absolutely not...

articles.title: SAS-MIL (1-0). An attacker out, a full-back in: at half-time there is Athekame for Nkunku. Leao points
articles.summary:
First substitution for Milan at half-time: Athekame comes on in place of Nkunku with Leao who takes over as striker in the Rossoneri's 4-4-1.

TARE'S WORDS

Rossoneri sporting director Igli Tare spoke to DAZN before the Sassuolo-Milan match.

articles.title: Why Tomori was sent off after 24 minutes of Sassuolo vs. Milan
articles.summary: Life became more difficult for Milan in their Serie A match away against Sassuolo after...

articles.title: An embarrassing fact: 0.06 xG produced by Milan in the first half against Sassuolo
articles.summary: In the first half against Sassuolo, Milan produced - so to speak - 0.06 xG: a very low expected goal figure, which practically arrived thanks to Leao's action which ended with a shot just wide of the target.

articles.title: SAS-MIL (1-0): end of the first half. Milan terrible: Tomori and Jashari a disaster, for Nkunku and Leao only errors. Pavlovic is saved
articles.summary: Milan's first half at the "Mapei Stadium" was a total disaster: one goal down due to Domenico Berardi's goal in the fifth minute after a trivial turnover in midfield by Jashari, one man down due to the...

articles.title: Milan Futuro, t-shirt dedicated to Tassotti before the Vogherese
articles.summary: Before the kick-off of Milan Futuro-Vogherese, during the team photo the Rossoneri displayed a shirt for Mister Tassotti with the writing: We are waiting for you Tasso.

articles.title: Serie A, Bologna-Cagliari 0-0: the updated standings. Sardinians practically safe
articles.summary: Only a 0-0 between Bologna and Cagliari, who thus divide the stakes. One point each, with Bologna momentarily eighth alone, while the Sardinians rise to +9 in the red zone.

articles.title: SAS-MIL (1-0). Tomori makes a show of nonsense: two useless fouls in 25 minutes and a red card. Milan with 10 men
articles.summary: Tomori continues his series of incredible defensive nonsense, but, at least for today, they will no longer be seen: the Englishman, in the 25th minute of the first half, received his second yellow card for a foul on Laurienté after suffering the first yellow card...

articles.title: Lauriente-Gabbia contact, right not to give a penalty. The reconstruction
articles.summary: Vibrant protests from Sassuolo for an episode in the Milan area at the start of the match: Lauriente, all alone, is tackled by Gabbia before the shot and then falls to the ground.

articles.title: SAS-MIL (1-0). Milan's shock start continues: Maignan miracle, Tomori yellow, Gabbia risks a penalty
articles.summary: Nightmare start for the Rossoneri, many technical errors and now also a yellow for Tomori, who entered late on Throsvedt. Shortly afterwards, a great save by Maignan on Nzola and a risky intervention in the penalty area by Gabbia on Lauriente.

articles.title: SAS.MIL (1-0). Soft start, Jashari sleeps and Berardi scores: Milan remained in the locker room
articles.summary: Berardi scores, the usual Berardi. Jashari soft in the melee with Thorsvedt allows the black-greens to restart, finishing with a precise shot from the Sassuolo number 10.

articles.title: Tare and the possibility of changing formation: "We will have to try to present ourselves with a team that can play in different ways"
articles.summary:
AC Milan DS Igli Tare spoke to DAZN before the match of Sassuolo-Milan. 

Do you also talk about the possibility of having the team play with other modules?

“Yes, too.

articles.summary: Today Ardon Jashari is started by Allegri in midfield to replace Modric. The Swiss, pursued for a long time by Milan in the summer, had a decidedly anonymous season, also due to the bad injury suffered at the end of the summer.
